footer.tagline: Welcoming families and friend groups since 2003. Max. 18 adults. Formerly Ferme du Château.

redirectBanner: Ferme du Château is now ArdenNest — more than a house, your nest in the Ardennes.

locationMap.heading: Location

alt.logo: ArdenNest logo — holiday home for groups in the Belgian Ardennes
alt.hero: Aerial view of holiday home ArdenNest with 2 hectares of garden in the Belgian Ardennes

vacationRental.description: Luxury holiday home for 26 people in the Belgian Ardennes. 9 bedrooms with ensuite bathrooms, professional kitchen and 2 hectares of garden. Ideal for multigenerational family weekends and group stays.

website.description: Quiet luxury holiday home in the Belgian Ardennes

bieke.description: Hostess of holiday homes in the Belgian Ardennes since 2003 alongside Christophe. Personal contact for ArdenNest guests.

christophe.description: Host in the Ardennes for 22 years alongside Bieke. Co-owner of ArdenNest in Gedinne.

lodgingBusiness.description: Group accommodation for 26 people in the Belgian Ardennes with personal welcome by the owners on site.
